description: WASM stock struct layout - byte offsets from stock_ptr base

key_findings.offset_292_is_pointer_not_lotSize: a[73] at offset 292 is consistently stock_ptr+2960, a pointer to ita/depth data, NOT lotSize as initially guessed from decompilation
key_findings.offset_668_is_pointer_not_tick_type: a[167] at offset 668 is ~17867188 across stocks (differs slightly for 9984 which uses different tick table). These are pointers to shared tick conversion tables, not per-stock enums
key_findings.price_fields_cluster: offsets 268-280 contain price10 fields: last(268), high(272), low(276), open(280). Verified: 6740 has high=1020 < open=1070 suggesting 272=session_high might be wrong - could be ask/bid side prices instead
key_findings.limit_prices_at_572: base/upper/lower price limits from master data stored at offsets 572-580 (int32[143-145])
key_findings.volume_turnover_at_304_312: 64-bit cumulative volume and turnover at offsets 304 and 312
key_findings.depth_fields_at_468_472: order book depth state at offsets 468-476, values 7/7 for all stocks
key_findings.mirrored_fields_424_440_448: offsets 424/440-444/448 mirror 268/312-316/304 (price10/turnover/volume) - likely a snapshot copy for display
key_findings.lotSize_at_offset_16: offset 16 consistently = 100 for all analyzed stocks (all standard TSE stocks with lot size 100). This is the actual lotSize field, NOT offset 292
key_findings.tick_indices_at_236_240: offsets 236 and 240 contain tick table indices. 236=high_tick_index, 240=current_tick_index. Used with _getTickIndexToPrice10 for price conversion
key_findings.struct_contains_linked_list_ptrs: offsets 96-108, 140-224 contain internal pointers to sub-structures (bid/ask book nodes) at fixed deltas from stock_ptr (720, 736, 744, 748, 760, 768, 800, 808, 840)

0.name: flex_version
0.note: = 18000 for all stocks, matches app/boot response flex_version

8.name: current_tick_index
8.note: tick table index, varies per stock, matches offset 240

16.name: lot_size
16.note: = 100 for all standard TSE stocks. The ACTUAL lotSize field (not offset 292)

96.name: bid_book_ptr_1
96.note: pointer to bid order book node, delta ~3064 from stock_ptr

116.name: order_book_depth_count
116.note: varies per stock (61-1469), number of depth levels?

236.name: high_tick_index
236.note: tick table index for session high price

240.name: base_tick_index
240.note: tick table index, same as offset 8

256.name: running_timestamp_ns
256.note: nanoseconds since midnight JST, matches qrm.timestamp exactly

268.name: last_price10
268.note: a[67], last traded price * 10, matches qrm.price10 exactly

272.name: price10_field_2
272.note: price field, sometimes > last_price10 (high?), sometimes < (for 6740: 1020 vs last=1060)

276.name: price10_field_3
276.note: another price field, close to last_price10

284.name: ita_view_ptr
284.note: pointer to order book view data, delta=848 from stock_ptr

288.name: ita_data_ptr_1
288.note: pointer to ita/depth data area, delta=2960 from stock_ptr

292.name: ita_data_ptr_2
292.note: a[73] - same value as offset 288. NOT lotSize (decompile label was misleading). Consistently = stock_ptr + 2960

296.name: boolean_toggle
296.note: toggled by field B bit 4, observed = 0 at session end

320.name: tick_index_field
320.note: varies per stock, similar range to offset 236/240

396.name: update_count_or_trade_count
396.note: varies widely per stock (136-35471), possibly trade tick count

404.name: cumulative_quantity_raw
404.note: varies per stock, possibly raw cumulative quantity (before lotSize multiplication)

424.name: display_price10
424.note: int32[106], mirrors last_price10 (offset 268). Used for display snapshot

464.name: best_price10
464.note: another price field, differs from last_price10 (best bid/ask?)

468.name: depth_level_a
468.note: field B value A target, = 7 for all stocks at session end

472.name: depth_level_b
472.note: field B value B target, = 7 for all stocks at session end

500.name: last_trade_type
500.note: for stocks with bid/ask activity: matches qrm.type (1=buy, 2=sell). 0 or other for inactive stocks

568.name: market_section
568.note: 1 for most stocks, 3 for 9984. Market section/listing type

572.name: base_price10
572.note: int32[143], base price * 10, from master data

576.name: upper_limit10
576.note: int32[144], upper price limit * 10, from master data

580.name: lower_limit10
580.note: int32[145], lower price limit * 10, from master data

584.name: lot_size_copy
584.note: = 100, same as offset 16. Redundant lot size in master data area

596.name: tick_count_or_range
596.note: varies (2050-5250), possibly tick table size or price range

604.name: name_length
604.note: byte length of stock name string that follows (32, 85, 96...)

608.name: stock_name_sjis
608.note: Shift-JIS encoded stock name, padded with 0x20 spaces. E.g., 1982=Hinichi HD

668.name: tick_table_ptr_1
668.note: a[167], pointer to tick conversion table. ~17867188 for standard stocks, slightly different for 9984 (different tick table)

744.name: tick_index_ask
744.note: tick index, = tick_index_bid + 2 for most stocks
